reviews.comment:
Cómo toda ypf buena atención, acá demoran un montón y hay cola casi siempre

(Translated by Google)
Like any good YPF service, here they take a long time and there is almost always a line.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estacion y excelente atencion del personal. Ademas Full compras y cafeteria

(Translated by Google)
Very good station and excellent staff service. Also, plenty of shopping and a cafeteria.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvME1UZFhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Automóvil Club argentino con la concesión de ypf se encuentra Sobre la avenida 3 en el partido de Villa gesell apócope A pocas cuadras del centro la atención es muy buena normalmente y sobre todo en temporada hay que hacer una espera para poder cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
The Argentine Automobile Club, with the YPF concession, is located on Avenida 3 in the Villa Gesell district. A few blocks from the center, the service is usually very good, especially during peak season, but you may have to wait to refuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvX19lNkV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Califico a los empleados y a la estacion en si yo cargo en shell

(Translated by Google)
I rate the employees and the station itself. I load at Shell.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdl9XVFlREAE

reviews.comment:
soy socio y me toco sufrir una cola de 40min x que solo había Infinia en una sola isla, por favor ser mas previsores.

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member and I had to endure a 40-minute queue because Infinia was only available on one island. Please be more proactive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvMy1lVXh3RRAB
